name: RNN Layer
description: Vanilla RNN layer: processes sequence step by step, h = tanh(W_ih @ x + W_hh @ h + b)
code:
_rnn{{_id}}_wih = np.random.randn({{hidden_dim}}, {{input_dim}}).astype(np.float32) * {{init_std}}
_rnn{{_id}}_whh = np.random.randn({{hidden_dim}}, {{hidden_dim}}).astype(np.float32) * {{init_std}}
_rnn{{_id}}_b = np.zeros({{hidden_dim}}, dtype=np.float32)
_rnn{{_id}}_bs, _rnn{{_id}}_sl, _ = {{input}}.shape
_rnn{{_id}}_h = np.zeros((_rnn{{_id}}_bs, {{hidden_dim}}), dtype=np.float32)
_rnn{{_id}}_outs = []
for _rnn{{_id}}_t in range(_rnn{{_id}}_sl):
    _rnn{{_id}}_xt = {{input}}[:, _rnn{{_id}}_t, :]
    _rnn{{_id}}_h = np.tanh(np.matmul(_rnn{{_id}}_xt, _rnn{{_id}}_wih.T) + np.matmul(_rnn{{_id}}_h, _rnn{{_id}}_whh.T) + _rnn{{_id}}_b)
    _rnn{{_id}}_outs.append(_rnn{{_id}}_h)
{{output}} = np.stack(_rnn{{_id}}_outs, axis=1)
{{hidden}} = _rnn{{_id}}_h
